instruction: Describe a potential real-world consequence of this vulnerability.
input: Script injection in iOSWeb in Google Chrome on iOS prior to 84.0.4147.105 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page.
output: A potential consequence could be an attacker exploiting this vulnerability to access sensitive information from a user’s device, or install malicious software without user consent, thereby compromising user privacy and security.
